name: La Maison du Vin de Saint-Emilion
summary: Central Saint-Emilion wine shop and orientation point with 450-plus local references at property prices.
whyItMatters: This is the simplest Saint-Emilion wine stop: central, open year-round, and useful even without a booked château visit.
pros: Official tourism page says it welcomes visitors year-round.
Official tourism page says it offers more than 450 Saint-Emilion wine references at property prices.
Central address at 1 Place Pierre Meyrat is easy to combine with village walking.
cons: More retail/orientation than immersive vineyard experience.
Can overlap with the Ecole du Vin and Salon Degustation candidates at the same address.

logistics.opening_hours: Jul-Oct: 09:30-18:30 continuously; Nov-Jun: 09:30-12:30 and 14:00-18:00 per tourism page.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until Saint-Emilion lodging/activity plan is fixed.
logistics.transit: Central village location; verify train/walk/taxi plan from Bordeaux if not staying nearby.
logistics.parking: Unknown; Saint-Emilion village parking can be constrained.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Not tied to a current viewing stage, but check local event traffic.

timing.best_visit_window: Start of Saint-Emilion visit to orient and choose bottles.
timing.race_day_risk: Low unless paired with the Bordeaux finish day transfer.

sources.title: Saint-Emilion Tourisme - La Maison du Vin de Saint-Emilion
sources.note: Supports year-round welcome, 450-plus references, property-price claim, address, coordinates, and seasonal opening hours.

open_questions: Decide whether to promote this as a stand-alone stop or as the base for a guided tasting module.
Verify July 2026 village parking or train connection once the day plan is set.
